title: IgesiGas celebrates a milestone two years of service excellence in George
description: BUSINESS NEWS - This month marks a proud...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - This month marks a proud milestone for IgesiGas in George - two years of keeping homes warm, kitchens cooking and businesses running smoothly.


> When owner Chris Stander first opened the doors, he promised to transform the former corporate-only managed Afrox site in Nelson Mandela Boulevard into a flexible, customer-focused independent agency.


Two years later, those promises have been exceeded.

"From day one, our goal was to combine Afrox's trusted international quality, safety standards and processes with the accessibility and personal service of a local agent," says Stander. "We've worked hard to deliver on that, and we'll keep raising the bar."

From the outset, IgesiGas committed to greater flexibility, personal, friendly service for every customer, convenient access for both large-scale and individual needs and uncompromising safety with genuine Handigas cylinders. Today, they've expanded their customer base to include a variety of industries, households and retail outlets. This makes Handigas more accessible, while every cylinder is filled to the correct weight, uniquely barcoded, sealed and safety-checked.

Why Handigas mattersIgesiGas supplies only Afrox Handigas, trusted for its consistent quality and rigorous safety checks.

Each cylinder carries the Afrox red seal of safety, guaranteeing it's been tested and meets strict standards.

"This isn't just about selling gas," says Stander. "It's about ensuring what goes into your home or business is safe, reliable and exactly what you paid for."

Local convenienceAlong with its depot service where the public can also collect purchases, IgesiGas supplies local retail outlets, allowing residents to refill or swap a Handigas cylinder closer to home.

This has been a game-changer for busy families and small businesses that can't afford downtime.

Looking aheadWhile two years is an achievement, Stander sees it as just the beginning. "We're deeply grateful for the support from the George community," he says. "Our focus remains on quality, safety, accessibility and personal service."

Whether you're heating your home, running a busy kitchen, or powering heavy industry, IgesiGas offers expertise, reliability and service you can depend on.

Trading hours

- Monday to Friday: 08:00 -16:30

Contact

- Call 044 802 8800 or visit 95 Nelson Mandela Boulevard, George Industria, George.
- Follow them on Facebook and Instagram: IgesiGas

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
